creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2009-05-25 22:46:24 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www/wget4web         Makefile pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - USE_APACHE=yes is deprecated
  - Use WWWOWN and WWWGRP
  - Use WWWDIR in Makefile and pkg-plist
  - Fix pkg-plist, use @dirrmtry
  - MKDIR => mkdir -p so need for -p
  
  PR:             ports/134448
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout (2 weeks)
  Submitted by:   me
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4       +11 -16    ports/www/wget4web/Makefile
  1.2       +14 -14    ports/www/wget4web/pkg-plist
